import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut start = i
    mut done_start = false
    while start < n and not done_start
      match string.byte_at(s, start)
      when Some(c)
        if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
          start = start + 1
        else
          done_start = true
        end
      when None
        done_start = true
      end
    end
    if start >= n
      i = n
    else
      mut stop = start
      mut done_end = false
      while stop < n and not done_end
        match string.byte_at(s, stop)
        when Some(c)
          if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
            done_end = true
          else
            stop = stop + 1
          end
        when None
          done_end = true
        end
      end
      let token = string.substring(s, start, stop)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = stop
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let len = list.len(nums)
  let take = if k < len
    k
  else
    len
  end
  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut output = ""
  mut count = 0
  while count < take
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < len
      if not list.contains(used, i)
        match list.get(nums, i)
        when Some(v)
          if best_idx == -1
            best_idx = i
            best_val = v
          else
            if v > best_val
              best_idx = i
              best_val = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if best_idx >= 0
      used = list.push(used, best_idx)
      if count == 0
        output = "#{best_val}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{best_val}"
      end
    end
    count = count + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
